title: TreAxe
subtitle: Construction operations, one connected workflow from first lead to final payment
outroNote: A production construction-operations platform. Co-built with a collaborator.

shots.title: Your whole business on one screen
shots.supportText: AI flags the jobs going cold before they cost you.
shots.caption: Role-aware dashboard with AI-detected project risks and live metrics

shots.title: Ask your data anything
shots.supportText: Plain-English questions, real answers cited from your own records.
shots.caption: AI assistant answers a plain-English question about estimate values, citing the read_estimates tool and real per-estimate and combined totals

shots.title: Win more work
shots.supportText: Move a lead from first touch to signed contract.
shots.caption: Lead-to-contract CRM as a drag-and-drop pipeline, with weighted forecast and win rate

shots.title: Bid in minutes
shots.supportText: Itemized line items, statuses, and e-signatures.
shots.caption: Estimating and bids, with line items, statuses, and win rate across projects

shots.title: Get paid
shots.supportText: Invoicing with AR aging and Stripe payments.
shots.caption: Invoicing with balance and AR aging tracking

shots.title: One connected flow
shots.supportText: Lead to estimate to project to invoice — nothing re-typed.
shots.caption: Project tracking across the full job lifecycle: budget, takeoff, daily logs and activity

shots.title: From estimate to proposal
shots.supportText: One click builds a professional client proposal.
shots.caption: One click turns an estimate into a professional client proposal: scope, costs, payment schedule, signatures
